title: Outlined ores
description: Outlined Ore is a resource pack that highlights diamond ore with magical outlines for better visibility.
body: # Outlined Ore (Java Edition) **Outlined Ore** is a minimalistic and magical resource pack that highlights Minecraft ores—specifically diamond ore—with vibrant outlines. This enhanced visual style improves ore visibility while maintaining a vanilla-friendly aesthetic. ## ✨ Features - Subtle magical effects for a visually enhanced mining experience - Faithful to the original texture style, just more readable and magical - Ideal for survival gameplay and cave exploration ## 🖼️ Preview ![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dSKlWPb4/images/233f45432d65d505da4c3f3a3b1f08a382ded945.png) ![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/dSKlWPb4/images/b9ab281a861989ae5942e9ff6afd4b1db175d077.png) ![3](https://static.planetminecraft.com/files/image/minecraft/texture-pack/2025/523/18843515-screenshot_l.webp) ## 📦 Compatibility - **Minecraft Version:** Java Edition 1.20+ - **Resolution:** 16x (Vanilla-style) - **Works with:** OptiFine, all mod loaders, or Vanilla ## 📥 Installation 1. Download the `.zip` file from the Files tab. 2. Place it in your Minecraft `resourcepacks` folder. 3. Enable it in-game from the Resource Packs menu. ## ❤️ Support If you enjoy the pack, consider giving it a like or sharing it with your friends! --- Made with magic ✨ and attention to ore detail.
